messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design a strategy consulting market entry presentation targeting C-Suite executives. Name the file 'Market_Entry_Strategy.pptx', write in English, and set slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape. The visual theme should be sleek corporate navy and silver with modern layout structures. You must not use external APIs or web scraping; rely exclusively on hardcoded mock data within your code. When creating charts, you are mandated to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. Additionally, always defensively check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing its .text attribute.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE, XL_MARKER_STYLE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = RGBColor(10, 31, 68)
SILVER = RGBColor(192, 197, 206)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(59, 130, 246)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(212, 175, 55)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(30, 41, 59)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(248, 250, 252)
MID_BLUE = RGBColor(30, 64, 175)

FONT_TITLE = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.4)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.3)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if font_size < 24 else FONT_TITLE
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=NAVY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = title
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = NAVY
        run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
        if body:
            p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
            p2.space_before = Pt(6)
            run2 = p2.add_run()
            run2.text = body
            run2.font.size = Pt(11)
            run2.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
            run2.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), label_text, font_size=10, bold=True, color=SILVER)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.2), Inches(6.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 235, 245)
        shape.line.color.rgb = SILVER
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.2),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=10, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A1F44")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7.5), Inches(1.2),
                 "Market Entry Strategy", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(3.1), Inches(6.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Strategic Analysis & Recommendations for Global Expansion", font_size=20, color=SILVER)

    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(3.5), Pt(2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "CONFIDENTIAL — Prepared for C-Suite Review", font_size=12, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    header_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2))
    header_bar.fill.solid()
    header_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    header_bar.line.fill.background()

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.top = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.width = Inches(0.1)
        title_shape.height = Inches(0.1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Executive Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    # KPI Cards row
    kpi_data = [
        ("Total Addressable\nMarket Size", "$47.3B", LIGHT_BLUE),
        ("CAGR (5-Year)", "18.2%", ACCENT_GOLD),
        ("Strategic Entry Window", "12 Months", MID_BLUE),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(3.6)
    card_h = Inches(1.4)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    for i, (title_text, value, accent) in enumerate(kpi_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.6), card_w, card_h, title_text, "", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=accent)
        # Value text on top of card
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(1.75), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.8),
                     value, font_size=32, bold=True, color=accent)

    # Body content — two columns
    left_col = [
        "• Market is fragmented with top 5 players holding only 31% share",
        "• Regulatory tailwinds favor new entrants in APAC region",
        "• Customer acquisition costs declining at 12% YoY",
    ]
    right_col = [
        "• Recommended entry via strategic partnership model",
        "• Initial investment of $85M over 3-year horizon",
        "• Projected breakeven within 24 months post-launch",
    ]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.3), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Key Findings", font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    for line in left_col:
        p = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.8), Inches(5.2), Inches(0.4), "", font_size=12, color=DARK_GRAY)

    # Build body text frame manually
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(3.7), Inches(5.2), Inches(2.8))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, line in enumerate(left_col):
        p = tf.paragraphs[0] if i == 0 else tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = line
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    txBox2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(5.0), Inches(2.8))
    tf2 = txBox2.text_frame
    tf2.word_wrap = True
    for i, line in enumerate(right_col):
        p = tf2.paragraphs[0] if i == 0 else tf2.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = line
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_footer(slide, 2, 6)


def slide_03_market_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.top = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.width = Inches(0.1)
        title_shape.height = Inches(0.1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Market Analysis", font_size=28, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Regional market sizing and growth trajectory across key geographies", font_size=13, color=DARK_GRAY)

    # Bar chart — Market Size by Region (Billions USD)
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["North America", "Europe", "Asia-Pacific", "LATAM"]
    chart_data.add_series("Market Size ($B)", [18.5, 14.2, 9.8, 4.8])

    left, top, width, height = Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(7.5), Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 25.0
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Market Size ($B)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(10)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    # Insight cards below chart
    insights = [
        ("North America", "Largest market at $18.5B with mature demand and high willingness to pay"),
        ("Asia-Pacific", "Fastest growing region at 24% CAGR driven by digital adoption"),
        ("Europe", "Regulatory clarity improving; EU market consolidation underway"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(3.6)
    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(insights):
        x = Inches(0.6) + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), card_w, Inches(1.2), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 6)


def slide_04_competitive_landscape(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    header_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2))
    header_bar.fill.solid()
    header_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    header_bar.line.fill.background()

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.top = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.width = Inches(0.1)
        title_shape.height = Inches(0.1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Competitive Landscape", font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    # Left side — Competitive positioning cards
    competitors = [
        ("Acme Corp", "Market Leader\n$12B Revenue"),
        ("GlobalTech Inc.", "Strong Contender\n$8.4B Revenue"),
        ("Nova Solutions", "Innovation Player\n$3.1B Revenue"),
        ("Summit Partners", "Regional Focus\n$1.9B Revenue"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.6)
    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(competitors):
        x = Inches(0.5) + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.6), card_w, Inches(1.8), name, desc, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=SILVER)

    # Right side — Market share donut chart
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    pie_data = CategoryChartData()
    pie_data.categories = ["Acme Corp", "GlobalTech", "Nova Solutions", "Summit Partners", "Others"]
    pie_data.add_series("Market Share (%)", [28, 19, 13, 8, 32])

    left, top, width, height = Inches(7.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(3.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, pie_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend.font.size = Pt(9)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"

    # Key differentiators card at bottom
    diff_text = ("Key Differentiators\n",
                 "• Proprietary technology platform with 3-year patent lead\n"
                 "• Exclusive distribution agreements in 4 key markets\n"
                 "• Lower CAC through integrated digital-first model")
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(11.8), Inches(2.6), diff_text[0], diff_text[1], bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_GOLD)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 6)


def slide_05_financial_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.top = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.width = Inches(0.1)
        title_shape.height = Inches(0.1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Financial Projections", font_size=28, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Five-year revenue forecast and profitability trajectory (USD in millions)", font_size=13, color=DARK_GRAY)

    # Line chart — Revenue projection over 5 years
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    line_data = CategoryChartData()
    line_data.categories = ["Year 1", "Year 2", "Year 3", "Year 4", "Year 5"]
    line_data.add_series("Revenue ($M)", [42, 98, 175, 260, 340])
    line_data.add_series("EBITDA ($M)", [-18, -5, 22, 58, 95])

    left, top, width, height = Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(7.5), Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, line_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_rev = plot.series[0]
    series_rev.format.line.color.rgb = NAVY
    series_rev.format.line.width = Pt(3)
    series_rev.marker.style = XL_MARKER_STYLE.CIRCLE
    series_rev.marker.size = 8

    series_ebitda = plot.series[1]
    series_ebitda.format.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    series_ebitda.format.line.width = Pt(3)
    series_ebitda.marker.style = XL_MARKER_STYLE.CIRCLE
    series_ebitda.marker.size = 8

    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "USD ($M)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(10)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    # Financial metric cards below chart
    metrics = [
        ("Projected Revenue (Y5)", "$340M", NAVY),
        ("EBITDA Margin (Y5)", "27.9%", ACCENT_GOLD),
        ("Return on Invested Capital", "31.4%", MID_BLUE),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(3.6)
    for i, (title_text, value, accent) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = Inches(0.7) + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), card_w, Inches(1.2), title_text, "", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=accent)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(5.6), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.8),
                     value, font_size=30, bold=True, color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 6)


def slide_06_next_steps(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    header_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2))
    header_bar.fill.solid()
    header_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    header_bar.line.fill.background()

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.top = Inches(-1)
        title_shape.width = Inches(0.1)
        title_shape.height = Inches(0.1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Next Steps & Timeline", font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    # Four-phase timeline cards
    phases = [
        ("Phase 1: Discovery\nMonths 1–3", "Market validation\nPartner identification\nRegulatory review"),
        ("Phase 2: Planning\nMonths 4–6", "Business model design\nTeam assembly\nPilot program launch"),
        ("Phase 3: Execution\nMonths 7–12", "Full market entry\nChannel build-out\nCustomer acquisition"),
        ("Phase 4: Scale\nMonths 13–24", "Regional expansion\nProduct localization\nM&A evaluation"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.6)
    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(phases):
        x = Inches(0.5) + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.6), card_w, Inches(3.8), title_text, body_text, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=SILVER)

    # Arrow connectors between cards
    for i in range(3):
        x = Inches(0.5) + (i + 1) * (card_w + CARD_GAP) - Inches(0.2)
        arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x, Inches(3.2), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
        arrow.line.fill.background()

    # Call-to-action box at bottom
    cta_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(5.7), Inches(7.5), Inches(0.8))
    cta_shape.fill.solid()
    cta_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    cta_shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(7.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "Approve $85M investment to initiate Phase 1 by Q1 — Board decision required", font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 6)


# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_market_analysis(prs)
    slide_04_competitive_landscape(prs)
    slide_05_financial_projections(prs)
    slide_06_next_steps(prs)

    prs.save("Market_Entry_Strategy.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
